description: Phase 2B — Presentation artifacts: slides, mindmap, infographic. Reuses the /generate router and artifacts/ convention from Phase 2A.

userStories.title: Refactor /slides into generate-slides handler
userStories.description: As a user, I want the existing /slides command to become a handler under /generate so that all artifact generators live behind one router.
acceptanceCriteria: Move the existing /slides skill content into .claude/skills/generate-slides/
Add a thin shim at .claude/skills/slides/SKILL.md that delegates to /generate slides (or deprecate /slides with a warning)
Handler integrates with artifacts/ convention: writes to vaults/<vault>/artifacts/slides/<topic>-<date>.{html,pdf} + .meta.yaml
Supports both Marp and Reveal.js backends via --format marp|reveal (pick one default — likely Marp)
Reads template from .claude/skills/generate-slides/templates/ with vault-local override at <vault>/.templates/slides/
Preserves source-hash + generated-from provenance like other handlers
Update sites/docs feature page to reflect new invocation
userStories.notes: If /slides currently writes to a different path, migrate existing generated slides or just leave them — document the break. — Done: generate-slides handler at .claude/skills/generate-slides/ with Marp default + --format reveal, artifacts/slides/ output, vault-local template override at <vault>/.templates/slides/, source-hash provenance, default template at templates/default.md. Legacy /slides reduced to deprecation shim that delegates to /generate slides.

userStories.title: Implement generate-mindmap handler
userStories.description: As a user, I want `/generate mindmap <topic>` to produce an interactive mindmap HTML file visualising the topic's wiki pages and their wikilinks.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .claude/skills/generate-mindmap/SKILL.md
Uses Markmap (npm i -g markmap-cli) as the renderer; lazy-installs on first use
Handler walks wiki pages matching the topic, builds a markdown outline using headings, and feeds to markmap
Output: vaults/<vault>/artifacts/mindmap/<topic>-<date>.html + .meta.yaml sidecar
Preserves wikilinks as clickable nodes where possible
Fallback: emit a Mermaid mindmap block if markmap-cli unavailable
userStories.notes: Markmap outputs self-contained HTML; no hosting needed. Great for Obsidian dataview embedding. — Done: generate-mindmap handler at .claude/skills/generate-mindmap/ with markmap-cli default + mermaid mindmap fallback, topic-same resolution as book/slides, outline built from H1/H2/H3 hierarchy, wikilinks as italic labels with optional --include-wikilinks sub-branch, Source link back to wiki page. Default template with markmap YAML options.

userStories.title: Implement generate-infographic handler
userStories.description: As a user, I want `/generate infographic <topic>` to produce a single-page SVG infographic summarising the topic.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .claude/skills/generate-infographic/SKILL.md
Ship at least 2 SVG templates in .claude/skills/generate-infographic/templates/ (e.g., 'stats-card', 'comparison-grid')
LLM selects a template based on the topic's wiki content (counts, comparisons, timeline hints) and fills slots
Output: vaults/<vault>/artifacts/infographic/<topic>-<date>.svg + optional PNG via rsvg-convert or similar + .meta.yaml
Templates follow Observatory color theme from CLAUDE.md (amber, cyan, green)
Documents how to author new templates
userStories.notes: Harder than it looks — the LLM needs to both pick the template and supply valid data. Start with 1 template if time-constrained. — Done: generate-infographic handler with 2 SVG templates (stats-card.svg, comparison-grid.svg) in Observatory palette, mustache placeholders, optional PNG export via rsvg-convert, auto template-pick based on content shape (comparison-grid if 'vs'/'versus' or ≥2 comparison pages; stats-card otherwise). Also extracted .claude/skills/generate/lib/select-pages.sh + resolve-wikilinks.sh as shared helpers (overdue after 3x duplication).

userStories.title: Document Phase 2B in sites/docs
userStories.description: As a user, I want docs for generate-slides, generate-mindmap, and generate-infographic including examples and template authoring guides.
acceptanceCriteria: Add/update sites/docs/src/content/docs/features/generate-slides.md (update existing /slides page if present)
Add sites/docs/src/content/docs/features/generate-mindmap.md
Add sites/docs/src/content/docs/features/generate-infographic.md
Include example commands + sample screenshots of generated artifacts
Reference Observatory color theme for infographic template authoring
Update commands.md reference page
Every flow page includes a mermaid diagram
